intro.heroSubtitle: Unicomm translates messages as you send them. Your team writes in their native language — everyone else reads in theirs.
intro.featuresTitle: Built for teams that speak every language
intro.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need for clear, professional, multilingual conversations.
intro.feature1Desc: Messages are translated the moment you hit send — no delays, no context-switching.
intro.feature2Desc: See who's online, who's typing, and when your team was last active.
intro.feature3Desc: View the original or the translation with one tap — context never gets lost.
intro.howSubtitle: Three steps to seamless multilingual conversations.
intro.step1Body: Choose your preferred language during onboarding. Every contact sets their own.
intro.step2Body: Type naturally in your own language. We'll handle the translation in-flight.
intro.step3Body: Recipients see messages in their preferred language, with the original one tap away.
intro.ctaTitle: Ready to remove the language barrier?
intro.ctaSubtitle: Join Unicomm and start conversations that cross every border.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your conversations.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join Unicomm and start chatting across languages.

register.errPasswordRule: At least 6 chars, one upper, one lower.

forgot.subtitle: Enter the email tied to your account and we'll send you a reset link.
